52131.english_desc:
A grotesque creature that blends seamlessly with thorny vines.
It hides tangled in dense forests or wedged between rocks, silently watching its surroundings. Rooted in place and merged with the terrain, it disguises itself until an unwary passerby finds unbreakable thorns driven into their skin.

1128.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_19} to vault over the back of an enemy.

Allows you to wield two-handed weapons with a single hand.
Equipping a greathammer as your secondary weapon will increase the damage of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Oongka_GroundSmash_I#Rampage} and {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Oongka_TurnBash_I#Raging Lightning}.

10095.english_desc: Hold {Key:Key_KickAttack} while high in the air to drive a precise diving kick. Cancels if there is no ground to land on.

1066.english_desc: Move across dimensions by using the {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_BlackWolf#Axiom Force}.

1057.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_4_Start} on a target to use Nature's Grasp, allowing you to lift or move heavy objects.

10236.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_4_Start} on a target to use Nature's Grasp, allowing you to lift or move heavy objects.

10041.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_4_Start} on a target to use Nature's Grasp, allowing you to lift or move heavy objects.

1041.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Mabongpa} while in {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Detect} to form a barrier of wind that blocks projectiles.

20096.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_16} during {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Mabongpa} to lash out with the energy stored while focused.

1044.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_HardAttack} to use Ranged Force Palm

1046.english_desc: Hold {key:key_SubAttack} + {Key:Key_NorAttack} to imbue the sword with the power of nature and attack.

1048.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_16} while falling at full speed to unleash a powerful ground slam fueled by your momentum and concentrated energy.

1054.english_desc: Press {Key:Key_Skill_23} to deploy smoke to escape enemies' sight.

1145.english_desc: Enhances swift actions with the power of nature.

1146.english_desc: Enhances swift actions with the power of nature.

20039.english_desc: Allows a more powerful Clothesline while sprinting.

20040.english_desc: Allows a more powerful Clothesline while sprinting.

20012.english_desc: Unleash relentless attacks on the enemy until your last breath.

60004.english_desc:
[Crafting Method]
Location: Smithy
Materials: {StaticInfo:MultiChange:Arrow}

A weapon used to hit targets from a distance during hunting or war. Used when attacking with a bow.

70142.english_desc: A leather armor once worn by the Crowcaller. The leather, hardened through unknown sorcery, is as tough as metal, and an ominous malice and magical power radiate from deep within the armor. After meeting his mother, he accepted wicked power and became a warrior of darkness.

70162.english_desc: Fortain, the Cursed Knight's sword. Through a contract with Hexe Marie, he gained the power to command his clone. But the moment he lost a fight, he was beheaded by that very clone.

8002.english_desc: Increases the Silver gain from loot.

9121.english_desc: A legendary headgear, its maker and origin unknown, said to grant its wearer the knowledge of the world. Rumor has it, this helm holds astonishing powers, allowing one to glimpse another's knowledge, or to see things hidden from mortal eyes.

9104.english_desc: A fish that isn't easily caught. It uses unique whiskers similar to a cat's to detect prey in murky water. It adapts to various water conditions and is known for its voracious appetite, reportedly stowing anything that moves into its mouth.

9127.english_desc: An earring imbued with Hexe Marie's magical power. Its latent magic enhances the wearer's abilities and shields the body from external threats.

9129.english_desc: A necklace that grants the strength to rise again when facing a fatal crisis. The magic within the necklace boosts the wearer's {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Hp#Health}, providing a chance for revival.

12023.english_desc: Intimidate enemies to reduce the number of attackers.

12025.english_desc: Intimidate enemies to reduce the number of attackers.

12052.english_desc: Set off quickly when moving from a standstill.
